top3.sql:
WITH male_clients AS (
    SELECT c.client_id, c.district_id
    FROM client c
    WHERE c.gender = 'M'
),
male_accounts AS (
    SELECT a.account_id, a.date AS account_date
    FROM account a
    INNER JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
    INNER JOIN male_clients mc ON d.client_id = mc.client_id
),
loan_amounts_1996 AS (
    SELECT SUM(l.amount) AS total_amount_1996
    FROM loan l
    INNER JOIN male_accounts ma ON l.account_id = ma.account_id
    WHERE strftime('%Y', l.date) = '1996'...

SELECT 
    (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', l2.date) = '1997' THEN l2.amount ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', l1.date) = '1996' THEN l1.amount ELSE 0 END)) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', l1.date) = '1996' THEN l1.amount ELSE 0 END) * 100 AS growth_rate
FROM loan l1
JOIN account a1 ON l1.account_id = a1.account_id
JOIN disp d1 ON a1.account_id = d1.account_id
JOIN client c1 ON d1.client_id = c1.client_id
JOIN loan l2 ON a1.account_id = l2.account_id
WHERE c1.gende...

WITH male_clients AS (
    SELECT c.client_id, c.district_id
    FROM client c
    WHERE c.gender = 'M'
),
male_accounts AS (
    SELECT a.account_id, a.date AS account_date
    FROM account a
    INNER JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
    INNER JOIN male_clients mc ON d.client_id = mc.client_id
),
loan_amounts_1996 AS (
    SELECT SUM(l.amount) AS total_amount_1996
    FROM loan l
    INNER JOIN male_accounts ma ON l.account_id = ma.account_id
    WHERE strftime('%Y', l.date) = '1996'...

WITH loan_1996 AS (
    SELECT 
        l.account_id,
        SUM(l.amount) AS total_amount_1996
    FROM loan l
    JOIN disp d ON l.account_id = d.account_id
    JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'male'
      AND strftime('%Y', l.date) = '1996'
    GROUP BY l.account_id
),
loan_1997 AS (
    SELECT 
        l.account_id,
        SUM(l.amount) AS total_amount_1997
    FROM loan l
    JOIN disp d ON l.account_id = d.account_id
    JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.cl...

     SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', l1.date) = '1996' THEN l1.amount ELSE 0 END)) /

FROM loan l1

JOIN client c1 ON d1.client_id = c1.client_id

WHERE c1.gende...
